findings.message: gate name must not be empty
findings.remediation: give each gate a stable name

findings.message: gate type "shell" must be one of: command, manual, external
findings.remediation: set type to command, manual, or external

findings.message: required_for value "ship" must be one of: blocked, closeout, done, handoff, implementation, partial, review
findings.remediation: use a supported gate profile or leave required_for empty for advisory gates

findings.message: timeout.seconds must be greater than zero when declared
findings.remediation: set a positive timeout or remove timeout metadata
